decoder_heading: Protecting your privacy is important to us

heading_content_part: Protecting your privacy is important to us.

decoder_heading: Generally, we DO NOT collect any personal identifiable information ('PII')
ident_heading: Generally, we DO NOT collect any personal identifiable information ('PII')
heading_content_part: Generally, we DO NOT collect any personal identifiable information ('PII') from you when you download our Android applications. We do not require the consumers to get registered before downloading the applications, nor do we keep track of the consumers' visits of our applications.

decoder_heading: The only situation we may get access to your PII
ident_heading: The only situation we may get access to your PII
heading_content_part: The only situation we may get access to your PII is

decoder_heading: when you decide to personally email us your feedback or to provide us with a bug report
ident_heading: when you decide to personally email us your feedback or to provide us with a bug report
heading_content_part: when you decide to personally email us your feedback or to provide us with a bug report. The PII we may get from you in that situation are strictly limited to your name, email address and your survey response only.

decoder_heading: In this situation, we guarantee that your PII will only be used for contacting you and improving our services
ident_heading: In this situation, we guarantee that your PII will only be used for contacting you and improving our services
heading_content_part: In this situation, we guarantee that your PII will only be used for contacting you and improving our services. We will never use such information (e.g. your name and email address) for any other purposes, such as to further market our products, or to disclose your personal information to a third party for commercial gains.

heading_content_part: the personal information you share is visible to other users and can be read, collected, or used by them. We are not responsible for the personal information you choose to submit in these instances.
